name: ClawVault
description: Structured memory system for AI agents with hybrid retrieval, cross-encoder reranking, adaptive capture, and multi-scope support

vaultPath.description: Path to the ClawVault vault directory. If not set, auto-discovered from CLAWVAULT_PATH or by walking up from cwd.

agentVaults.description: Mapping of agent names to vault paths. Falls back to vaultPath if agent not found.

autoRecall.description: Enable automatic memory recall on session start

autoCapture.description: Enable automatic observation capture from conversations

recallLimit.description: Maximum number of memories to recall per query

templatesDir.description: Custom path to template schema directory

autoCheckpoint.description: Enable automatic checkpointing on session events

contextProfile.description: Default context profile for session start injection

maxContextResults.description: Maximum number of context results to inject on session start

observeOnHeartbeat.description: Enable observation threshold checks on gateway heartbeat

weeklyReflection.description: Enable weekly reflection on Sunday midnight UTC

defaultScope.description: Default memory scope. Use 'global' for shared, or 'agent:<id>', 'project:<name>', 'user:<id>' for scoped.

semanticWeight.description: Semantic search weight in RRF fusion

rrfK.description: RRF k parameter (higher = more weight to lower-ranked items)

recencyHalfLifeDays.description: Recency boost half-life in days (0 = disabled)

decayHalfLifeDays.description: Time decay half-life in days (0 = disabled)

lengthNormAnchor.description: Length normalization anchor in characters (0 = disabled)

mmrLambda.description: MMR diversity lambda (1.0 = no diversity, lower = more diverse)

rerankApiKey.description: API key for the reranker service

rerankModel.description: Reranker model name (auto-selected per provider if omitted)

rerankWeight.description: Weight of reranker score vs fused score (0.6 = 60% reranker)

noise.description: Noise filtering configuration for write and read paths

adaptive.description: Adaptive retrieval configuration — skip retrieval for low-value queries

skipPatterns.description: Additional regex patterns that should skip retrieval

vaultPath.label: Vault Path
vaultPath.description: Path to your ClawVault memory vault

autoRecall.label: Auto Recall
autoRecall.description: Automatically recall relevant memories on session start

recallLimit.label: Recall Limit
recallLimit.description: Max memories to recall per query

defaultScope.label: Default Scope
defaultScope.description: Default memory scope (global, agent:<id>, project:<name>, user:<id>)

retrieval.label: Retrieval Pipeline
retrieval.description: Configure hybrid search, reranking, recency, and diversity settings

noise.label: Noise Filter
noise.description: Filter low-quality content from capture and retrieval

adaptive.label: Adaptive Retrieval
adaptive.description: Skip memory retrieval for greetings, commands, and acknowledgments
